calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2019 Off Calendar

Motion For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Jesus Orellana.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

John E. Cowan, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Heath-Newton LLP.
Mr. Cowan was placed under oath and testified in his capacity as principal at Heath-Newton LLP.
No appearance by defendant Jesus Orellana.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on October 27, 2017.
Substitute service of defendant Jesus Orellana occurred on December 12, 2017, and was effectuated on December 22, 2017.
Default as to defendant Jesus Orellana was entered on May 1, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on June 12, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Heath-Newton LLP, and against the Defaulted Defendant Jesus Orellana, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,093.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,146.00.
Costs - $645.00.

Total - $28,884.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Motion For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-01-2019 Continued

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2019 Continued To Apr-23-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2018 Continued To Feb-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance. Plaintiff's Counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Feb-05-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
